type: CLAIM
files: tiktoken/core.py
summary: Adding return_positions param to Encoding.encode to track token start char positions

type: CLAIM
files: tiktoken/core.py
summary: Adding transformers parameter to Encoding.encode for pre-encoding text transformation

type: STATUS
files: tiktoken/core.py
summary: Added transformers param (Callable[[str],str] or Sequence of them) to Encoding.encode signature, applied before allowed_special/disallowed_special handling; done editing, low risk of clobber since it only touches the encode() signature/docstring/body start

type: STATUS
files: tiktoken/core.py
summary: Added return_positions param to Encoding.encode (signature+docstring+body), plus new private helpers _encode_with_positions/_encode_ordinary_with_positions; done editing. Note: our changes both touch encode()'s signature/docstring so a merge will need manual reconciliation.
